headline: Thredd Joins The Visa Agentic Ready Programme, Bringing Agent Network Readiness To Issuers Across Europe, Starting With Zilch
summary: LONDON, July 15, 2026--Thredd, the AI-first issuer processing platform, today announced it has joined the Visa Agentic Ready programme, enabling issuers across Europe to participate in agent-initiated payments without rebuilding their payments infrastructure. Consumer payments platform Zilch will be among the first issuers on the platform to enable agent-initiated payments for its cardholders.

headline: Visa (V) Launches AI Financial Assistant For Banks And Cardholders
summary: Visa (NYSE:V) is launching an AI Financial Assistant for banks and cardholders. The service is designed to power conversational, in app experiences with personalized spending insights and recommendations. The initial rollout is planned for the U.S. in August 2026, with global expansion to follow. Visa is best known for its global payments network. This AI Financial Assistant moves the company further into software driven financial services. For banks, it represents a way to offer Visa's AI...
